name: 5S_rRNA_solo_loci
description: Solo 5S rRNA genes in S. pombe. Unlike S. cerevisiae (where 5S is embedded in the rDNA array), S. pombe scatters its ~30 copies of 5S rRNA across the three chromosomes as solo Pol III transcription units. Each ~120 bp gene plus short flanking sequence is near-identical across copies (>97%), so reads multi-map. Independent of the chrIII rDNA arrays.
